_comment: Candidate references for the SMC-PSO-beta double inverted pendulum (DIP) on a cart. verify_references.py checks each DOI against Crossref metadata + (legal) Unpaywall open-access PDF text. 'expected.system' must be 'double' for any reference used as the source of DIP physical parameters. NEVER fabricate an entry to make a check pass.

references.title: Optimal Control of a Double Inverted Pendulum on a Cart
references.alt_locator: Technical Report CSE-04-006, OGI School of Science and Engineering, OHSU
references.role: PRIMARY DIP parameter + M/C/G derivation source (absolute-angle). No DOI; confirm via archived PDF.

references.title: Swing-up of the double pendulum on a cart by feedforward and feedback control with experimental validation
references.authors: Knut Graichen, Michael Treuer, Michael Zeitz
references.role: Experimentally-validated DIP-on-cart with measured parameters. NOTE: frequently miscited as 2005; confirm year=2007.

references.title: Energy and passivity based control of the double inverted pendulum on a cart
references.role: Passivity/energy-shaping DIP; relevant to skew-symmetry + energy invariants. Confirm DOI/arnumber 973983.

references.title: A Lyapunov approach to second-order sliding mode controllers and observers
references.role: STA Lyapunov proof source (controllers.bib). Already verified authentic.

references.title: Ten Simple Rules for Reproducible Computational Research
references.authors: Geir Kjetil Sandve, Anton Nekrutenko, James Taylor, Eivind Hovig

references.title: Applied Nonlinear Control
references.role: Textbook; sliding-surface + boundary-layer. Confirm via ISBN, no DOI.

references.title: Modeling and simulation of double inverted pendulum
references.role: SUSPECTED FABRICATION. Expect Crossref to NOT resolve this DOI to this title. Document the negative result; do NOT re-add to config.bib.

references.title: Modelling and simulation for optimal control of nonlinear inverted pendulum dynamical system using PID controller and LQR
references.authors: Lal Bahadur Prasad, Barjeev Tyagi, Hari Om Gupta
references.role: REAL but SINGLE inverted pendulum. Confirms provenance mismatch: cannot source DIP parameters. Document, do not use for DIP params.
